name: The Recluse | Healing After Battle.
description:
"We must needs take our respite and mend our wounds ere we embark upon another foray, dear Nightfarer… For the Nightlord shall show us no quarter, no mercy, when next we cross his path…"

The Recluse is the Mage of your party of Nightfarers, a group of warriors alike brought together to save the Lands Between. After an exhausting defeat, you and the Recluse make preparations for the next expedition. You ended up saving her from the a devastating blow, making her slightly thankful for you.

Okay, so, I've been busy in the last couple of days and broke my streak of bot making, to which I'm sorry but I'm back at it with yet another Elden Ring bot. Since Nightreign has just dropped I decided to make a bot of the Recluse Baddie from the game. As of writing this I just beat the First Expedition in the game after about three hours? By the way, the bot might be inaccurate due to making this the day after the game actually drops, I'll be sure to update it as the game progresses in content.

I've been loving Nightreign but I hope FromSoftware make the game cross platform so I can play with my friends on consoles. Either way, I've been playing with my duo but the matches take so long to load when you're running with just a duo which sucks. Either way, my favourite character to play as is the Duchess (so potentially expect a bot of her, too) but the Recluse is also fun to play as.

Image Source.
creator: MoistCrow_
